'''galate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:numbingly|numbingly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-l-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:numbingly|numbingly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| galate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:galate|galate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:galatesher|galatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:galatesherĂ«m|galatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:galatero|galatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:galateshĂ«|galateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:galateshĂ«m|galateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigalatero|gokigalatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokigalateshĂ«|gokigalateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigalateshĂ«m|gokigalateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gogalankerom|gogalankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogalankeshĂ«|gogalankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogalankeshĂ«m|gogalankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gogalankeya|gogalankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:galaterom|galaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:galatemu|galatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:galateya|galateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigalaterom|gokigalaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigalatemu|gokigalatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokigalateya|gokigalateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:galalate|galalate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:galalatesher|galalatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:galalatesherĂ«m|galalatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:galalatero|galalatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:galalateshĂ«|galalateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:galalateshĂ«m|galalateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigalalatero|gokigalalatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokigalalateshĂ«|gokigalalateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigalalateshĂ«m|gokigalalateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gogalalankerom|gogalalankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogalalankeshĂ«|gogalalankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogalalankeshĂ«m|gogalalankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gogalalankeya|gogalalankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:galalaterom|galalaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:galalatemu|galalatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:galalateya|galalateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigalalaterom|gokigalalaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigalalatemu|gokigalalatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokigalalateya|gokigalalateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:gĂŠlĂŠte|gĂŠlĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:gĂŠlĂŠtesher|gĂŠlĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gĂŠlĂŠtesherĂ«m|gĂŠlĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gĂŠlĂŠtero|gĂŠlĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«|gĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«m|gĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigĂŠlĂŠtero|gokigĂŠlĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokigĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«|gokigĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«m|gokigĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-

|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogĂŠlĂŠnkeshĂ«|gogĂŠlĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogĂŠlĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gogĂŠlĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gĂŠlĂŠteya|gĂŠlĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigĂŠlĂŠterom|gokigĂŠlĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigĂŠlĂŠtemu|gokigĂŠlĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokigĂŠlĂŠteya|gokigĂŠlĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:gaflafte|gaflafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:gaflaftesher|gaflaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gaflaftesherĂ«m|gaflaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gaflaftero|gaflaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gaflafteshĂ«|gaflafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gaflafteshĂ«m|gaflafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigaflaftero|gokigaflaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokigaflafteshĂ«|gokigaflafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigaflafteshĂ«m|gokigaflafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gogaflafnkerom|gogaflafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogaflafnkeshĂ«|gogaflafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogaflafnkeshĂ«m|gogaflafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gogaflafnkeya|gogaflafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gaflafterom|gaflafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gaflaftemu|gaflaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gaflafteya|gaflafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigaflafterom|gokigaflafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigaflaftemu|gokigaflaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokigaflafteya|gokigaflafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
